title: Parallel agent steps share working tree — filesystem conflicts in concurrent file-writing workflows
body: The parallel: step type and DAG-inferred parallelism run agents concurrently in the same working directory. If two parallel agents modify the same file (or even different files that trigger build/lint side effects), results are undefined. pi-subagents solves this with git worktree isolation: temp worktrees per agent, node_modules symlink, diff capture after completion, cleanup in finally block. Our parallel steps need an optional worktree: true flag with equivalent machinery.
